titleStmt.title: SII 18.134: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 134. (B.K. No. 56 of 1934-35.) MUDĒNŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Bhūlōkamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 53, Kīlaka, Śrāvaṇa, Friday, Saṁkramaṇa, Maghā-nakshatra. The tithi is lost. The details correspond to A.D. 1128, July 27, Friday. Nakshatra Maghā however did not occur on that day.

It records a grant of certain incomes made to Paṭṭavardhana Gōbinda-Ghaisāsa of Mudugundūr by Mahādēvarasa, the Daṇḍanāyaka in charge of vaḍḍarāvuḷa, Kētamallaseṭṭi, the Pergaḍe in charge of the herjjuṅka and Duggarasa, the Heggaḍe of bilukoḍe. The last two were officers under Mahāmaṇḍalēs11avra Tailahadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ . namaśivāya namaḥ
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svasti samastabhu
vanāśraya śrīpruthvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu bhū
lōkamalladēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarapravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire śrī
maccāḷukyavikramakālada 53ne kīla
kasaṁvachsarada śrāvaṇa sukra
vāra saṁkramaṇa byatīpāta maghāna
kratra daṁdu A tithiyalu śrīmaReadkṣa
du vaḍḍarāvuḷada danḍanāyakaṁ mahā
dēvarasaruṁ śrīmanma(ma)hāmaṁnḍa
ḷēśvaraṁ tailahadēvara herjjuṁkada pe
rggaḍe kētamallaseṭṭiyaru Avara bi
lukoḍa heggaḍe duggarasarumiḻdu mu
dugundūra paṭavarddhana gōbindaghayisāsa
rgge khanḍikake vahamāna mānamāgi Ācaṁ
drārkatāraṁbaraṁ Avarige biṭṭa dharmmameṁnteṁdeḍe Āvū
sada bhaṁnḍakke hattiya maḷavege yirppattakke 1
kke hēḻiṁge hattakke 1 davasada hēḻiṁge ha
ttakke 1 Alliyāya 1 Alli ṭhāṇāya sa
hita māḍidaḍaṁ
satiyalu
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundharā
ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi © © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
